original: Used by soldiers and police officers to quickly neutralize shielded or robotic opponents, modern EMP grenades temporarily fry electronics. Though individually expensive, these little babies pretty much pay for themselves when you’re up against a heavily shielded enemy or an assassin droid!
Pulling the pin on a grenade without a target to throw it at would be pretty dumb now, wouldn’t it?
{var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.

original: The electronic burst from the grenade has temporarily disrupted your systems!
